problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
